meaning: n.弯曲,歪曲,乖僻,偏差,乖戾,偏见vt.弄歪,使翘曲,使不正常,歪曲,使有偏见vi.变弯,变歪,变的反常
examples: Left out in the heat of the sun, tapes easily warp or get stuck in their cases.
The window frames had begun to warp.
Is it an area of time warp?
Yet peer inside Challenger II today, and you'll find a sagging, faded 1980s time warp.
Unleash unique power-up abilities for each Super Critter including Time Warp, Anti-Gravity abilities and more!
